functions.name: UnregisterTabByID
functions.description: Given an ID for a tab, try to close and unregister a tab that was registered through this subsystem

functions.name: SpawnRegisteredTabByID
functions.description: Given an ID for a tab, try to find a tab spawner that matches, and then spawn a tab. Returns true if it was able to find a matching tab spawner

functions.name: SpawnAndRegisterTabWithIdGeneratedClass
functions.description: Unlike SpawnAndRegisterTabAndGetID allows spawn tab while providing TabID from Python scripts or BP

functions.name: SpawnAndRegisterTabWithId
functions.description: Unlike SpawnAndRegisterTabAndGetID allows spawn tab while providing TabID from Python scripts or BP

functions.name: ReleaseInstanceOfAsset
functions.description: Allow startup object to be garbage collected

functions.name: FindUtilityWidgetFromBlueprint
functions.description: Given an editor utility widget blueprint, get the widget it creates. This will return a null pointer if the widget is not currently in a tab.

functions.name: DoesTabExist
functions.description: Given an ID for a tab, try to find an existing tab. Returns true if it found a tab.

functions.name: CloseTabByID
functions.description: Given an ID for a tab, try to find and close an existing tab. Returns true if it found a tab to close.
